label: subject of
description: A law, parable, aphorism, or cultural artifact that this entity is the primary subject of. Value is a folklore entity (a @folklore-artifact).

label: coined
description: A term, law, or phrase this person or organization coined or first articulated. Value is a @folklore-artifact.

label: quoted as
description: A direct quotation attributed to this entity. String-valued. Attach source for attribution.

label: parable of
description: A broader principle or concept that this entity illustrates or is commonly used to explain. String-valued slug.

label: originated in
description: The publication, talk, project, or event where this entity was first described or debated.

label: popularized by
description: The person, post, or publication that brought wide attention to this idea. May differ from the originator.
